ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR(leaseworks__Airframe_Cycles_Landing_During_Month__c <0 , leaseworks__Cycles_During_Month_APU__c <0 , CONTAINS(leaseworks__FH_String__c , "-"), leaseworks__Hours_During_Month_APU__c <0, leaseworks__Cycles_During_Month_Engine1__c <0, leaseworks__Cycles_During_Month_Engine2__c <0, leaseworks__Cycles_During_Month_Engine3__c <0, leaseworks__Cycles_During_Month_Engine4__c <0, leaseworks__Cycles_During_Month_Landing_Gear__c <0, leaseworks__FC_Landing_Gear_LM__c <0, leaseworks__FC_Landing_Gear_LW__c <0, leaseworks__FC_Landing_Gear_RM__c<0 , leaseworks__FC_Landing_Gear_RW__c <0, leaseworks__Hours_During_Month_Engine1__c <0, leaseworks__Hours_During_Month_Engine2__c <0, leaseworks__Hours_During_Month_Engine3__c <0, leaseworks__Hours_During_Month_Engine4__c <0, leaseworks__Hours_During_Month_Landing_Gear__c <0, leaseworks__FH_Landing_Gear_LM__c <0, leaseworks__FH_Landing_Gear_LW__c <0, leaseworks__FH_Landing_Gear_RM__c <0, leaseworks__FH_Landing_Gear_RW__c <0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Value should be equal or above zero
